creator: eric.douzet@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

firefox-17.0.7,1 and firefox-i18n-17.0.7

After new one installation by compilation, into a new computer, in the Add-ons tab it misses the Language section. Thus I cannot activate the french localization. I recompiled several times xpi-quick-locale-switcher 1.7.8.5 and firefox-i18n-17.0.7 but nothing to make !

Even if you install the Mozilla version of the xpi-quick-locale-switcher 1.7.8.7 the tab language is not present. You can not activate languages.

Best regards,

Éric Douzet

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
